bomShell.releaseConfirmBody: [DE] This will lock the next revision and create an immutable snapshot. The changelog will be sent to engineering, procurement, and finance. You can still create the following revision afterwards.
bomShell.approveConfirmBody: [DE] You’re approving {{version}} as the current revision. The previous revision will move to history.

pricing.title: [DE] Plans & pricing
pricing.subtitle: [DE] Choose the plan that fits your team
pricing.footer: [DE] All plans billed annually, 14-day free trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

printPo.title: [DE] Purchase Order
printPo.termsBody: [DE] Payment Net 30 from receipt of invoice. Goods must conform to specifications, RoHS-compliant, with country-of-origin labelling. Late delivery beyond ETA may incur 0.5%/week penalty. All items subject to inspection at receiving. Reference PO number on packing slip and invoice.
printPo.authorizedBy: [DE] Authorized by Buyer · K. Singh, Procurement Lead

roadmap.title: [DE] Product Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: [DE] What we're building next
roadmap.voteRecorded: [DE] Vote recorded · we'll prioritize based on demand

tour.step1Body: [DE] Your active workspace view. Switch between BOM Editor, Components, Vendors, Procurement, and more from this left rail.
tour.step2Body: [DE] Find any part, vendor, BOM, or action from anywhere. Try ⌘K from any screen.
tour.step3Body: [DE] You're working in this project's BOM. Click ATLAS in the breadcrumb to switch projects.
tour.step4Body: [DE] Live totals from your BOM — cost, lead time, vendor + country diversification, risk flags.
tour.step5Body: [DE] Every part has Find Alternates, Send RFQ, Duplicate, Delete, and more. The chevron next to it opens full detail.
tour.step6Body: [DE] @-mentions, approval requests, supply-chain alerts. Live and persistent.

autoScrape.instruction: [DE] Enter a part number — we'll query manufacturer sites, Octopart, Digi-Key, Mouser, and FindChips. You'll review before applying.
autoScrape.mergingResults: [DE] Merging results · resolving conflicts · scoring confidence
autoScrape.appliedToast: [DE] {{n}} fields applied to {{pn}} · sourced from {{count}} websites

bomDuplication.title: [DE] Duplicate BOM
bomDuplication.subtitle: [DE] Create a variant copy of the current BOM
bomDuplication.includeCosts: [DE] Include cost data (clear for fresh costing)
bomDuplication.apiConnectedInfo: [DE] ● Will create a new project and save BOM to server
bomDuplication.offlineInfo: [DE] ○ Offline mode: BOM will be duplicated in browser only
bomDuplication.info: [DE] The duplicated BOM will contain all the same parts and structure. Part IDs will be regenerated to prevent conflicts.

rollback.title: [DE] Rollback revision
rollback.subtitle: [DE] Restore a previous revision as the active BOM
rollback.description: [DE] Rolling back replaces the current BOM data with the selected revision. The current state is not lost — it remains as the latest revision in history.
rollback.rolledBackToast: [DE] Rolled back to {{ver}} · BOM state restored
